payload.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Define unattended execute-mode promotion gate" in phase "30m Heartbeat Dry-Run Soak Test"?
groundedNodeLabels: Review 30m dry-run soak evidence against promotion gate
Define the execute-mode promotion bar for Victor and tie unattended operation to explicit evidence, fallback, and revocation rules.
Define Victor unattended execute-mode promotion criteria
Execute-mode promotion criteria are explicit, governed, and stricter than dry-run soak success alone.
Run a bounded unattended 30m dry-run heartbeat against real governed work and verify safety signals before unattended execution is allowed.
recommendedNextActions: Implement promotion criteria are explicit, auditable, and stricter than the dry-run soak baseline
